The '''2-1B technical droid''' was a [[technical droid]] that specialized in repairing droids and replacing their parts.

==History==
In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], a group of them replaced [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO's]] exterior plating with shells resembling common [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] droids, which allowed them to spy on the ceremony where [[Trioculus]] declared himself the heir to [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] throne and ruler of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

{{Droid-stub}}
